text:
MATERIAL CROWN is a jewelry brand that collaborates with popular anime and game franchises. For each collaboration, they create specially designed products.

Information

The first collaboration merchandise was released in November 2022.

Collaboration Characters

Gon Freecss
Killua Zoldyck
Hisoka Morow
Chrollo Lucilfer
